case_title: KI CHAE WOO VS. SOUTHEAST INC.,

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, KI CHAE

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, KI CHAE SERVED OCT-21-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHEAST INC. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-01-2004 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING SERVICE OF NTC OF ENTRY OF JUDGT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGT ON DEFT CORPORATION BY DELIVERY OF PROCESS TO SECRETARY OF STATE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, KI CHAE
ORDER DIRECTING SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT ON DEFENDANT CORPORATION BY DELIVERY OF PROCESS TO SECRETARY OF STATE (CCP 416.10(D); CORP C 1702 (A))
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, KI CHAE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHEAST INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOO, KI CHAE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHEAST INC. $24,372.00 PRINCIPAL, $464.15 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,836.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
